name: [GenAI][Order Support Assistant] High-risk tool action executed without approval
message: A high-risk action (write/delete/send/purchase/financial) executed without required approval. Zero-tolerance governance control. Escalate to Architecture + Responsible AI/Risk. @security-oncall @pagerduty-genai-oncall
source_addendum_ref: AI Observability - Datadog Implementation Addendum, §8 — 'High-risk action without approval: Zero tolerance'
